description:
**Milestone:** Phase 2: Component Expansion

Build hx-avatar: user/provider profile images with fallback initials and status indicators. Used for healthcare provider profiles.

**Files to Modify:**
- packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-avatar/

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Image, initials, and icon fallback modes
- [ ] Sizes: xs, sm, md, lg, xl
- [ ] Status indicator (online, away, busy, offline)
- [ ] Shape: circle, square, rounded
- [ ] CSS parts: image, initials, status
- [ ] Lazy loading for images
- [ ] <5KB gzipped

**Complexity:** small
title: Implement hx-avatar component
